name: codex-pilot
description: Guide Codex through repository setup, planning, verification, and durable project guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Codex through better repo work.
interface.longDescription: CodexPilot helps Codex inspect a project, create useful repo guidance, add planning templates, define verification commands, and turn repeated failures into durable docs, tests, scripts, or rules.
defaultPrompt: Create AGENTS.md, docs, plans, and checks.
Diagnose repeated Codex failures in this repo.
